ListItem.Para: Associated stabilizer control channel is deactivated.

Note.Para: The airplane must also be dispatched using MEL item 27-41-03.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Deactivate the associated stabilizer control channel (AMM DDG 27-48-01).

ListItem.Para: Using a flight deck multi-function display only, open circuit breaker ELECT STAB-L and lock with an INOP tag.
Gain access to the L2 Electronic Motor Control Unit (EMCU).
Disconnect, cap, and stow the associated 235 VAC electrical connector.

Note.Para: The STABILIZER L2 advisory message and STAB CHANNEL status message will be displayed.
For stabilizer channel deactivation due to stabilizer position transducer fault, it is not required to remove the associated motor / brake assembly and install dispatch tool K27048.

ListItem.Para: Using a flight deck multi-function display only, open circuit breaker ELECT STAB-R and lock with an INOP tag.
Gain access to the R2 Electronic Motor Control Unit (EMCU).
Disconnect, cap, and stow the associated 235 VAC electrical connector.

Note.Para: The STABILIZER R2 advisory message and STAB CHANNEL status message will be displayed.
For stabilizer channel deactivation due to stabilizer position transducer fault, it is not required to remove the associated motor / brake assembly and install dispatch tool K27048.

ListItem.Para: Confirm the FLIGHT CONTROL SYS status message is not displayed.
Confirm the STABILIZER SYS status message is not displayed.
Verify remaining stabilizer channel operates normally.
From either control wheel trim switch, trim in either direction and confirm stabilizer movement on the EICAS stabilizer position indication. The stabilizer will move at half the normal rate.

OperationNote.Para: The STABILIZER L2 or STABILIZER R2 advisory message will be displayed.
